Back to archive Relation thread

Story Relationship Map

Theme, character, institution, and image links that help readers choose the next tale.

Underworld justice席方平 (Xi Fangping)Underworld anomaly陆判 (Lu Pan)Underworld examination考城隍 (Examination for City God)Liaozhai night reading画皮 (Painted Skin)Ruined temple聂小倩 (Nie Xiaoqian)Mountain magic崂山道士 (The Taoist of Laoshan)Street magic种梨 (Seed Pear)River ghost王六郎 (Wang Liulang)Fox girl and blossoms婴宁 (Yingning)Fox house lamplight青凤 (Qingfeng)Marriage anomaly江城 (Jiangcheng)Flower-spirit vow香玉 (Xiangyu)Twin tombs and longing韩凭夫妇 (Han Ping and His Wife)Small creature, large fate促织 (Cuzhi / The Cricket)Famous swords and revenge干将莫邪 (Ganjiang and Moye)Visionary landscape山市 (Mountain Market)Foreign-land satire罗刹海市 (Luocha Haishi)Six Dynasties zhiguai宋定伯捉鬼 (Song Dingbo Catches a Ghost)
Underworld power

席方平 (Xi Fangping) / 陆判 (Lu Pan)

One follows blocked appeals; the other shows a judge altering fate.

Underworld institutions

席方平 (Xi Fangping) / 考城隍 (Examination for City God)

Injustice, exams, and offices show the afterlife copying human systems.

Two night-encounter readings

画皮 (Painted Skin) / 聂小倩 (Nie Xiaoqian)

Both begin with nocturnal encounter; one is disguise, the other captivity and escape.

Magic and shortcuts

崂山道士 (The Taoist of Laoshan) / 种梨 (Seed Pear)

One satirizes the shortcut-seeker; the other makes a marketplace briefly impossible.

Moral choice among the uncanny

王六郎 (Wang Liulang) / 聂小倩 (Nie Xiaoqian)

Both figures are more than threats; each chooses within a binding rule.

Fox women and household order

婴宁 (Yingning) / 青凤 (Qingfeng)

Both ask how nonhuman women enter, resist, or reshape household rules.

Female force inside household order

婴宁 (Yingning) / 江城 (Jiangcheng)

Yingning's laughter and Jiangcheng's force both expose boundaries inside household order.

Plant memory

香玉 (Xiangyu) / 韩凭夫妇 (Han Ping and His Wife)

Flower spirit and longing tree both preserve feeling as visible form.

Institutional failure

促织 (Cuzhi / The Cricket) / 席方平 (Xi Fangping)

One tracks pressure downward; the other pushes grievance upward.

Memory after violence

干将莫邪 (Ganjiang and Moye) / 韩凭夫妇 (Han Ping and His Wife)

Sword and tree both preserve wronged names inside legend.

Mirage and visionary city

山市 (Mountain Market) / 罗刹海市 (Luocha Haishi)

One watches a phantom city appear; the other enters a reversed world.

How identity is rewritten

陆判 (Lu Pan) / 罗刹海市 (Luocha Haishi)

One changes body and talent; the other changes the system of judgment.

Negotiating with ghosts

宋定伯捉鬼 (Song Dingbo Catches a Ghost) / 王六郎 (Wang Liulang)

One resists through wit; the other builds trust through repeated meeting.

Midnight Archive

Public-domain tale guides, source checks, and original editorial notes. Every English page keeps a visible source and translation note.
